# GitHub Copilot — BrightHive instructions

Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) and [`PR_RULES.md`](../PR_RULES.md) before generating code.

## Hard rules

- **PR size**: < 500 lines = good, 500–700 = warning, 700–900 = stop, ≥ 900 = blocked. Reviewers will refuse oversized PRs. See [`PR_RULES.md`](../PR_RULES.md).
- **No AI attribution** in commits, comments, or files. No "Co-Authored-By: Copilot", no "Generated by Copilot".
- **Specs first**: no code without a spec at `docs/specs/`.
- **Conventional commits**: `type(scope): description`, imperative, ≤72 chars.
- **Never log credentials**, JWTs, OAuth tokens, or PII.

## Project-specific conventions

- Sprint artifacts at `jira/sprint/{N}/` — never invent alternate paths
- Jira tickets must have a parent epic via `parent: {key: "BH-XXX"}` (never `customfield_10014`)
- All trial/PoC tracker work uses the framework at `scripts/poc_tracker/`

When in doubt, mirror the patterns in `AGENTS.md` and `PR_RULES.md`. If those conflict with what feels idiomatic, the local docs win.
